paragraphs: Monks Medical is a modern, patient-centred general practice in Plettenberg Bay led by Dr Kyle Rorke. The practice is built on personalised, thorough medical care that integrates conventional general practice with a collaborative, multidisciplinary healthcare model.

The practice provides all the services expected from a trusted family GP — including acute consultations, chronic disease management, routine medicals, pregnancy care, and childhood vaccination programmes — while also offering an expanded healthcare environment designed to optimise long-term wellbeing.

general.title: Primary Care Services
general.paragraph: We offer primary care services to patients of all ages, including routine check-ups, preventive care, and management of acute and chronic medical conditions. Whether you require a routine health assessment, vaccinations, or treatment for common illnesses such as colds, flu, or infections, our team is here to provide compassionate and expert care.

general.title: Chronic Disease Management
general.paragraph: For patients living with chronic medical conditions such as diabetes, hypertension, asthma, or heart disease, we offer comprehensive management plans tailored to individual needs. By emphasising patient education, lifestyle modifications, and appropriate medical interventions, we aim to optimise disease control and improve quality of life.

general.title: Sports Medicine
general.paragraph: With a shared passion for sports and exercise medicine, we offer specialised services to athletes and fitness enthusiasts. Whether you're dealing with sports injuries, musculoskeletal pain, or seeking guidance on performance optimisation, we provide evidence-based treatment and personalised advice to help you stay active and healthy.

general.title: Paediatric Care
general.paragraph: We provide comprehensive paediatric care for infants, children, and adolescents, focusing on preventive health, developmental milestones, and timely immunisations. Whether your child needs a well-baby check-up, vaccinations, or treatment for common childhood illnesses, our team is dedicated to providing gentle and compassionate care to support their growth and development.

additional.title: Nutritional Counselling
additional.paragraph: We offer nutritional counselling and guidance to help patients achieve their health and wellness goals. Whether you're looking to manage your weight, improve your diet, or address specific nutritional concerns, we provide practical advice and support to help you make sustainable lifestyle changes.

additional.title: Mental Health Support
additional.paragraph: We understand the importance of mental health in overall well-being, and we offer compassionate support and evidence-based interventions for patients dealing with stress, anxiety, depression, or other mental health concerns. Through counselling, medication management, and referral to mental health specialists, we are committed to helping you achieve emotional wellness.

additional.title: Men’s Health
additional.paragraph: Men's health is an important aspect of our practice, and we offer services tailored to address the unique health concerns of male patients. From prostate screenings to testosterone replacement therapy, we provide personalized care to support men in maintaining their health and vitality at every stage of life.

additional.title: Unique Services
additional.paragraph: At Monks Medical, we offer a few different services that set us apart. We have a point-of-care blood machine capable of conducting CRP, influenza, and COVID swabs in real-time tests, enabling quick and accurate diagnosis. Additionally, our team is certified to perform point-of-care ultrasound examinations using a Butterfly iQ handheld ultrasound machine, enhancing our diagnostic capabilities and enabling immediate assessment and management of various conditions.

contact.address: Unit 5, Monk’s View Building, 4 Church St, Plettenberg Bay, 6600

dripsPage.paragraph: Vitamin C: Enhances immune function Vitamin B Complex: Supports energy production and immune health Magnesium Sulphate (MGSO4): Essential for enzyme function and nerve transmission Zinc: Vital for immune system function G.A.C Formula (Glutamine, Arginine, Carnitine): Supports cellular health and immune function

dripsPage.paragraph: Vitamin C: Supports liver detoxification pathways Vitamin B Complex: Aids in liver function and energy metabolism Magnesium Sulphate (MGSO4): Helps with detoxification and relaxation Zinc: Supports liver health and regeneration G.A.C Formula (Glutamine, Arginine, Carnitine): Promotes liver cell repair and detoxification Glutathione: Powerful antioxidant crucial for liver health Selenium: Supports liver enzyme function

dripsPage.title: Combat Oxidative Stress and Promote Cellular Health
dripsPage.paragraph: Vitamin C: Potent antioxidant protecting cells from damage Vitamin B Complex: Supports energy production and antioxidant pathways Magnesium Sulphate (MGSO4): Helps relax muscles and supports antioxidant enzymes Zinc: Essential for antioxidant enzyme function G.A.C Formula (Glutamine, Arginine, Carnitine): Enhances cellular function and antioxidant capacity Glutathione: Master antioxidant crucial for detoxification and cellular defence Selenium: Supports antioxidant enzyme activity Alpha-Lipoic Acid (ALA): Regenerates other antioxidants and supports cellular energy production N-Acetylcysteine (NAC): Precursor to glutathione, aiding in detoxification and antioxidant support NeuroRevive Therapy

dripsPage.title: Restore Neurological Vitality and Cognitive Function
dripsPage.paragraph: NAD+ (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide): Supports cellular energy production and DNA repair Vitamin C: Protects neurons from oxidative stress and supports neurotransmitter synthesis Vitamin B Complex: Essential for nerve function and neurotransmitter production Personalisation is available based on blood tests and genetic analysis to tailor micronutrients for optimal neurorecovery. Each infusion is meticulously crafted to address specific health needs and can be personalized for individual requirements based on thorough assessments
